zh.lifeSummary: Richard Backler是Richard Backler和Joan Upcher的兒子，於大約1584年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。他於1610年5月3日與Anna 'Hanna' Sherman在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1639年7月在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Backler是Richard Backler和Joan Upcher的儿子，于大约1584年出生在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆。他于1610年5月3日与Anna 'Hanna' Sherman在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1639年7月在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Backler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: occupational name, status name from Norman French bacaler ‘a young knight, a novice in arms’. The [k] is a characteristically Norman form where Central French has [tʃ]; see Batchelor .

variants.name: Backner
meanings: 1 English: occupational name from Middle English * baconer, * baconour ‘curer of bacon, bacon-seller’.
2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Backler  .

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Backler was born about 1584, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard Backler and Joan Upcher. He married Anna 'Hanna' Sherman on 3 May 1610, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died in July 1639, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Backler est né environ 1584, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard Backler et Joan Upcher. Il a épousé Anna 'Hanna' Sherman le 3 mai 1610, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1639, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Backler wurde um 1584 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard Backler und Joan Upcher geboren. Er hat am 3. Mai 1610 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Anna 'Hanna' Sherman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1639 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Backler è nato il circa 1584 nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard Backler e Joan Upcher. Lui sposato Anna 'Hanna' Sherman il 3 maggio 1610, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1639, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Backlerは約1584年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでRichard BacklerとJoan Upcherの息子として生まれた。1610年5月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでAnna 'Hanna' Shermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年7月に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Backler(은)는 대략 1584년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Richard Backler(와)과 Joan Upcher의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1610년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Anna 'Hanna' Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 7월 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Backler nasceu aproximadamente 1584, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard Backler e Joan Upcher. Ele casou-se com Anna 'Hanna' Sherman em 3 de maio de 1610, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1639, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Backler родился около 1584 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard Backler и Joan Upcher. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna 'Hanna' Sherman 3 мая 1610 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер июль 1639 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Backler nació aproximadamente 1584, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Richard Backler y Joan Upcher. Se casó con Anna 'Hanna' Sherman el 3 de mayo de 1610, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en julio de 1639, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
